sourceMovie.title: Radius
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Radius (2017) stuck because it commits to its thriller premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Steeve Léonard's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The thriller and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Premonition
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Radius clicked for you, Premonition (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Radius?
faq.answer: Try Premonition, Black Rain, Sisters—each shares DNA with Radius while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Radius?
faq.answer: Radius (2017) is best described as Thriller, Drama, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Radius worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
